title: chamaemelum triumfettii
intro: Chamaemelum nobile, often referred to as Chamaemelum nobile subsp. tridentatum or Chamaemelum nobile subsp. faurei, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae), and is also known as Chamaemelum triumfettii. Chamaemelum nobile is used in herbal medicine due to its carminative, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, such as indigestion, gas, and bloating, and has also been used to relieve anxiety, insomnia, and other health issues. Chamaemelum nobile is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
